dod_met: `gold.run` loads persisted Silver via `persist.load_stats/load_news` from `--silver-root` with optional `--ingest-date`.
`gold.run main(argv=None)` parses `--silver-root`, `--out`, `--ingest-date`, `--year-min`, `--year-max`, and `--counts-out`, writes Gold, writes counts, and returns the output path.
Gold output defaults are under `output/`; CLI smoke wrote Gold 4x4 and counts from a local persisted Silver tree.
Counts JSON includes rows, columns, column_names, contains_AT, contains_HU, year_min, year_max, and row counts when geo/year exist.
New `pytest.mark.integration` test persists fixture-derived Silver to `tmp_path`, invokes `gold.run.main([...])`, and verifies Gold Parquet plus counts.
New test uses `tmp_path` and `tests/fixtures/bronze`; no coursework data, network, MinIO, or Ollama dependency.
`write_gold_counts` moved to `gold.build`; `pipeline.py` imports it and existing pipeline counts behavior is preserved.
Empty Gold warning in `build_from_silver` is preserved.
Verification passed: `python -m pytest -q -m unit` -> 89 passed, 14 deselected.
Verification passed: `python -m pytest -q -m integration` -> 14 passed, 89 deselected.

CLI smoke passed with `python -m railway_lakehouse.gold.run --silver-root output/runtime/gap-007-cli-smoke/silver --out output/runtime/gap-007-cli-smoke/gold/railway_ml.parquet --counts-out output/runtime/gap-007-cli-smoke/gold/counts.json --ingest-date 2026-06-23`.
Docs and dashboard updated: GAP_REGISTER, CODEMAP, STATE_AND_ROADMAP, TASKS, index.html, PROGRESS_LOG, COURSEWORK_PROGRESS, research note, and implementation plan.
PR #18 is open against `main` and GitHub reports `MERGEABLE` / `CLEAN`.
notes: Added pytest `pythonpath = ["src"]` so exact pytest commands verify the current checkout even when another railway-lakehouse worktree is globally installed editable.
